name: Is fault determined by the AI or the lawyer who accepted the referral?
description: Lawyer liable for not verifying AI referral; AI not at fault.[3][9]

mainEntity.name: Is fault determined by the AI or the lawyer who accepted the referral?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lawyer liable for not verifying AI referral; AI not at fault.[3][9]
acceptedAnswer.description: The lawyer is liable for accepting flawed AI referral without due diligence. Courts hold attorneys responsible, as in ChatGPT sanctions.[3][9] Key factors: duty to verify, shared fault in referral fees.[4] AI is tool, not decision-maker. Prove lawyer ignored red flags.
